_publications._publicationTitle: Influences of RASopathies on Neuroanatomical Variation in Children.

_contextSnippet: we found significant group differences after FDR correction in the left and right putamen ( p =0.003, p =0.002), left and right accumbens ( p =0.003, p= 1.3e −4 ), left and right caudate ( p =0.004, p =0.005)
details: Successfully performed statistical analysis detecting significant subcortical volume differences after FDR correction in multiple brain regions including putamen (p=0.003, p=0.002), accumbens (p=0.003, p=1.3e-4), caudate (p=0.004, p=0.005), and pallidum (p=0.022).
